ssc-higher-math-ch11-set09-q21.explanation: d=√[(9−3)²+(7−-1)²]=√100=10। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set09-q22.explanation: m=(y₂−y₁)/(x₂−x₁)=(1−0)/(2−0)=1/2। — Slope নির্ণয় previous-year pattern-এ গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set09-q23.explanation: মধ্যবিন্দু=((1+7)/2, (2+4)/2)=(4, 3)। — Midpoint formula board-standard short calculation। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set09-q24.explanation: d=√[(3−0)²+(4−0)²]=√25=5। — Coordinate geometry-এর distance formula previous board pattern-এ repeated। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।

ssc-higher-math-ch11-set09-q25.explanation: m=(y₂−y₁)/(x₂−x₁)=(0−2)/(4−1)=-2/3। — Slope নির্ণয় previous-year pattern-এ গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। — Board-standard concept টপিকটি syllabus + model/board pattern অনুযায়ী repeated high-priority area।
